summary: Engineered business-critical applications for retail and B2B sectors, focusing on scalable full-stack architectures and seamless user experiences.
overview: OmneVu specializing in high-performance digital commerce and business process automation solutions.
Worked across Retail, FMCG, and B2B service domains to deliver end-user software products.

projects.title: Inventory Management System
contributions: Developed a real-time tracking module for multi-warehouse stock management.
Implemented automated low-stock alert systems using threshold-based triggers.
Engineered high-performance bulk-import tools for catalog updates.
impact: Reduced manual stock reconciliation time by 40%.
Improved inventory accuracy across 10+ retail nodes.

projects.title: Warranty Management System
contributions: Architected a centralized warranty claim processing engine.
Integrated dynamic PDF generation for warranty certificates and claim summaries.
Built a customer-facing portal for self-service status tracking.
impact: Streamlined claim verification process, reducing turnaround time by 30%.
Enhanced customer trust through transparent lifecycle visibility.

projects.title: RetailSoft Platform
contributions: Designed and implemented complex business logic for automated invoice generation.
Developed custom UI widgets for data-heavy reporting dashboards.
Optimized database queries for fast retrieval of sales analytics.
impact: Automated 90% of monthly billing tasks for internal stakeholders.
Provided real-time visibility into sales performance metrics.

projects.title: YellowPages (B2B Portal)
contributions: Built a robust search engine with advanced filtering for business discovery.
Developed a marketplace-style logic for business listings and leads management.
Implemented state-of-the-art form validation and profile management modules.
impact: Scaled platform to handle 5000+ active business listings.
Improved conversion rates for business discovery through optimized search UI.

growth: Working across multiple business domains from Retail to B2B Services.
Designing workflow-driven systems that automate complex manual processes.
Handling state complexity in data-heavy business applications.
Building marketplace-style logic for listings and leads management.
Developing full-stack ownership of features from DB schema to UI implementation.
